title: EVLV.studio - AI-Powered Ads Design SaaS
description: A revolutionary SaaS platform for AI-driven ad creation - static banners, video ads, social media packs, and client management - built from the ground up.

production_highlights: Full SaaS platform built with AI-first development
Static and video banner ad generation
Social media design pack creation
Built-in client management system
Empowering brand designers with AI capabilities

technical_specifications.Ad Types: Static Banners, Video Banners, Social Packs

short_description: A revolutionary SaaS platform for AI-driven ad creation - static banners, video ads, social media packs, and client management - built from the ground up.
long_description: EVLV.studio is a comprehensive SaaS platform that empowers brand designers to create stunning advertising content using AI. The platform features an intuitive interface for generating static banner ads, dynamic video banners, and complete social media design packs - all powered by cutting-edge generative AI. With built-in client management capabilities, designers can seamlessly handle multiple brand accounts and deliver consistent, high-quality creative assets. Brand designers working with EVLV.studio consistently report mind-blowing results, transforming their creative workflows and output quality.

title: Interactive Live Streaming
description: Interactive live-stream sessions that ignite real-time audience participation and boost engagement across your brand channels.
long_description: I crafted dynamic, professionally produced live-stream experiences that turned passive viewers into active participants. By weaving real-time Q&As, interactive polls, and exclusive behind-the-scenes moments into each broadcast, I strengthened community bonds, broadened reach, and delivered measurable engagement gains. Recent projects raised average chat participation by 45 % and doubled watch-time per viewer—proof that my streams made a measurable impact.can
